items.content:
About This Role

We are looking for a Junior QA Automation Engineer to join our Amsterdam team and help build out our test automation capabilities. This is an excellent opportunity for someone early in their career who is passionate about software quality and wants to grow their automation skills in a supportive, collaborative environment.

You will work alongside senior QA engineers and developers to write automated tests, learn our testing frameworks, and contribute to our quality processes from day one.

Responsibilities

  • Write and maintain automated end-to-end tests using Playwright or Cypress
  • Execute manual test cases when automation is not yet in place
  • Report and track bugs with clear reproduction steps and evidence
  • Participate in sprint planning to provide testing estimates and identify risks
  • Help maintain our test documentation and test case repository
  • Learn and apply testing best practices with guidance from senior team members

Requirements

  • 0-2 years of experience in software testing or QA (internship experience counts)
  • Basic programming skills in JavaScript, TypeScript, or Python
  • Understanding of software testing concepts (test levels, test types, defect lifecycle)
  • Strong attention to detail and analytical mindset
  • Good communication skills in English

Nice to Have

  • Experience with test automation frameworks (Playwright, Cypress, Selenium)
  • Familiarity with CI/CD concepts and Git
  • ISTQB Foundation Level certification or equivalent coursework
